## Checklist

- [ ] Domain(s) are lowercase, no paths or protocol
- [ ] Type is one of: shortener, redirector, tracking
- [ ] Status is one of: active, defunct, malicious
- [ ] At least one evidence URL provided per entry
- [ ] Entries are sorted alphabetically by domain
- [ ] No duplicate domains (across all data files)

## Data file(s) changed

- [ ] data/shorteners.json
- [ ] data/redirectors.json
- [ ] data/tracking.json
